title: Clerical and typographical errors
doc_html:
§5.  Clerical and typographical errors

Clerical and typographical errors in the Revised Statutes shall be disregarded when the meaning of the legislature is clear.
doc_text:
§5.  Clerical and typographical errors
Clerical and typographical errors in the Revised Statutes shall be disregarded when the meaning of the legislature is clear.
